'''dhapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadchromatically|quadchromatically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadchromatically|quadchromatically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhapate|dhapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhapatesher|dhapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapatesherĂ«m|dhapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhapatero|dhapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhapateshĂ«|dhapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapateshĂ«m|dhapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhapatero|gokidhapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhapateshĂ«|gokidhapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhapateshĂ«m|gokidhapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhapankerom|godhapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhapankeshĂ«|godhapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhapankeshĂ«m|godhapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhapankeya|godhapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhapaterom|dhapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapatemu|dhapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhapateya|dhapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhapaterom|gokidhapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhapatemu|gokidhapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhapateya|gokidhapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhapapate|dhapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhapapatesher|dhapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapapatesherĂ«m|dhapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhapapatero|dhapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhapapateshĂ«|dhapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapapateshĂ«m|dhapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhapapatero|gokidhapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhapapateshĂ«|gokidhapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhapapateshĂ«m|gokidhapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhapapankerom|godhapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhapapankeshĂ«|godhapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhapapankeshĂ«m|godhapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhapapankeya|godhapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhapapaterom|dhapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapapatemu|dhapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhapapateya|dhapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhapapaterom|gokidhapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhapapatemu|gokidhapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhapapateya|gokidhapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠpĂŠte|dhĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠpĂŠtesher|dhĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠpĂŠtero|dhĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠpĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠpĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠpĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠpĂŠterom|dhĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠpĂŠtemu|dhĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠpĂŠteya|dhĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠpĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠpĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafpafte|dhafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafpaftesher|dhafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafpaftesherĂ«m|dhafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafpaftero|dhafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafpafteshĂ«|dhafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafpafteshĂ«m|dhafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafpaftero|gokidhafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafpafteshĂ«|gokidhafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafpafteshĂ«m|gokidhafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafpafnkerom|godhafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafpafnkeshĂ«|godhafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafpafnkeshĂ«m|godhafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafpafnkeya|godhafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafpafterom|dhafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafpaftemu|dhafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafpafteya|dhafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafpafterom|gokidhafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafpaftemu|gokidhafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafpafteya|gokidhafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
